scenario_name: Scenario 13 — Async Implementation with Error Propagation
justification: All pass criteria met: sequential async calls (fraud before gateway, verified with callOrder array), AC6 explicitly tested (gateway.charge not.toHaveBeenCalled when fraud detected), AC4/AC5 chain original error via cause property, AC3 preserves decline reason from gateway with fallback, all 6 ACs covered with 12 tests using mock services, acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 6 ACs.

observations.text: Call ordering explicitly verified with shared callOrder array, not just implicit from sequential awaits
AC6 tested both under fraud detection (AC2) and fraud service network error (AC4) — gateway verified not called in both cases
Error chaining uses cause property on PaymentError, verified in tests for both AC4 and AC5
AC3 includes fallback handling for missing declineReason — goes beyond minimum spec
No Promise.all usage; strict sequential flow enforced
12 tests across all 6 ACs with controlled mock services
